title: Weight Loss and Oral Thrush - HIV/AIDS
chief_complaint: Unintentional weight loss of 12 kg in 3 months, chronic diarrhea, oral thrush, and persistent fever.

physical_exam.oral: White plaques on tongue and buccal mucosa (thrush)

hidden_data.hiv_test: HIV-1 antibody: Positive, confirmed with Western blot

correct_diagnosis: AIDS (HIV Stage 3) with Oral Candidiasis and Kaposi Sarcoma
key_learning_points: Prophylaxis: TMP-SMX for PCP if CD4 <200

patient_responses.sexual_history: I have had multiple partners, unprotected

feedback.correct_message: Well diagnosed. AIDS with classic opportunistic infections.
feedback.incorrect_message: This is AIDS. The CD4 <200 + oral thrush + Kaposi sarcoma are diagnostic.
feedback.attending_note: AIDS management: Start ART immediately (tenofovir/emtricitabine/dolutegravir). Treat oral thrush with fluconazole. TMP-SMX prophylaxis for PCP. Kaposi sarcoma may improve with ART alone. Refer to oncology if extensive.
